description: Your Music. Your Way. — AI-powered music layer unifying local library and streaming services with AirPlay 2 multi-room.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.desc: Xcode project, Expo Bare setup, App Store Connect, cloud backend skeleton, user accounts, library scanner, basic playback. Nothing else works without this.

features.name: GitHub repo — github.com/tomfo/sorriva
features.desc: Create github.com/tomfo/sorriva. Initialize with README, .gitignore, branch protection on main.

features.name: Xcode project + Expo Bare setup
features.desc: Initialize React Native Expo Bare project targeting iOS, iPadOS, tvOS, macOS. Configure build schemes, signing, and bundle identifiers for all four targets.

features.name: App Store Connect records — iOS, iPadOS, tvOS, macOS
features.desc: Create app records for all four platforms in App Store Connect. Configure TestFlight for internal testing.

features.name: Cloud backend skeleton
features.desc: Provision cloud hosting (Railway, Fly.io, or Render — TBD). Initialize backend service with health endpoint, environment config, and PostgreSQL database connection.

features.name: Local SQLite cache per device
features.desc: Per-device SQLite database for offline library index, play queue, and cached metadata. Syncs with cloud backend when online.

features.name: User accounts + auth
features.desc: User registration, login, and session management via Clerk or Auth0. user_id FK on all database records from day one. Auth middleware stub in app — bypassed locally, enabled for commercial launch.

features.name: Household profiles
features.desc: Multi-profile support within a single account. Each profile has its own play history, favorites, and preferences. Profile switcher in settings.

features.name: Library scanner — SMB + local device + USB-C drive
features.desc: Scan music library from three source types: NAS via SMB share, local device storage, and external USB-C drive (iPadOS 13+ Files app access). Index files into local SQLite cache. Supported formats: FLAC, ALAC, MP3, AAC, WAV, AIFF.

features.name: Basic local file playback
features.desc: Play indexed local files on device. Play, pause, skip, seek, volume. Device speaker only — no zones yet. Foundation for all playback features.

features.name: sessions.json + version.json initialized
features.desc: Initialize velocity tracking and version files. sessions.json carries forward entries from planning sessions 2026-06-24-1 and 2026-07-03-1.

phases.name: Music Graph
phases.desc: MusicBrainz MBID matching, source de-duplication, unified track model, metadata enrichment pipeline. Everything else depends on the graph.

features.name: Unified music graph data model
features.desc: Core Track entity with source array (local, Spotify, Apple Music, Qobuz). One track identity across all sources — source is resolved at playback time. Schema includes user_id, play count, last played, playlist membership from day one.

features.name: MusicBrainz MBID matching + AcoustID fingerprinting
features.desc: Assign canonical MusicBrainz IDs to local library tracks. Acoustic fingerprinting via AcoustID for files without embedded IDs. Cross-platform ID mapping to bridge Spotify IDs and Apple Music IDs. 90%+ match rate target; low-confidence matches flagged for manual review.

features.name: Cross-source track de-duplication
features.desc: Identify tracks available across multiple sources (local + Spotify + Apple Music + Qobuz). Present as single track entry with source list. 'Available on X sources' indicator. User configures preferred source order in settings.

features.name: Context-aware source resolution
features.desc: At playback time: detect home network vs away. Home = local FLAC preferred, fallback to Apple Music then Spotify. Away = Apple Music then Spotify. Network detection via local IP range check. Transparent to user — it just plays.

features.name: Metadata pipeline — album art
features.desc: Fetch and cache hi-res album art for all library tracks. Multiple sizes (thumbnail, full, backdrop). Served from local cache. Sources: embedded file tags first, MusicBrainz Cover Art Archive, iTunes Search API as fallback.

features.name: Metadata pipeline — bio, reviews, credits
features.desc: Artist biography (Last.fm primary, Discogs fallback). Album reviews (Pitchfork, AllMusic, RateYourMusic). Credits — producer, engineer, session musicians (MusicBrainz). Genre/tags (Last.fm + MusicBrainz). Related artists.

features.name: Source badge system
features.desc: Visual source attribution on every track cell and now playing screen. Spotify green, Apple Music gradient, Qobuz blue, local library icon. Always shown, never hidden. Core to the product's honest positioning.

features.name: Play history + statistics tracking
features.desc: Log every play event: track, source, profile, timestamp, duration played. Per-profile play count, last played date, total hours. Foundation for Deriva AI recommendations and annual wrap-up.

phases.name: Streaming Sources
phases.desc: Spotify Connect, MusicKit (Apple Music), Qobuz Connect, context-aware source resolution. Core value proposition.

features.name: Streaming service connection settings
features.desc: Settings screen for connecting and disconnecting streaming services. OAuth flow per service. Shows connection status, account info, and subscription tier. User configures preferred source order for context-aware resolution.

features.name: Spotify Connect — in-app playback
features.desc: In-app Spotify playback via Spotify Connect API. Sorriva controls playback; Spotify streams directly to device. No Spotify app UI shown. Source badge displays Spotify logo. Requires Premium subscription. Includes catalog search, library browse, and playlist import.

features.name: Apple Music — MusicKit in-app playback
features.desc: In-app Apple Music playback via MusicKit framework. Full catalog search and streaming inside Sorriva UI. Apple Music developer entitlement required. Library sync from user's Apple Music library.

features.name: Qobuz Connect — hi-res in-app streaming
features.desc: In-app Qobuz hi-res streaming via Qobuz Connect API. Catalog search, library browse, hi-res quality selection. Source badge displays Qobuz logo.

features.name: iHeartRadio — live radio stations
features.desc: Live radio station search and playback via iHeartRadio API. Station browse by genre and location. Integration depth TBD — deferred pending decision.

phases.name: Zones & AirPlay 2
phases.desc: AirPlay 2 multi-room, unified device discovery, saved zone groups, EQService abstraction, Sonos/BluOS native API control layer. Multi-room is core value.

features.name: Unified device discovery
features.desc: Discover all audio endpoints on the local network: AirPlay 2 devices via mDNS/Bonjour, Sonos via local HTTP API, Bluesound via BluOS. Present as one unified zone list. No protocol awareness required from user. Sonos native groups and stereo pairs surface as single zones.

features.name: Sonos native group + stereo pair preservation
features.desc: Sonos hardware groups and stereo pairs are defined at firmware level and must be respected as-is. Sorriva discovers and treats them as single opaque zones. Never regroups or breaks native Sonos configuration. Users do not need to regroup anything in Sorriva.

features.name: AirPlay 2 multi-room streaming
features.desc: Simultaneous playback to multiple AirPlay 2 endpoints with latency-matched sync handled natively by the protocol. Independent volume per zone. Apple TV initiates all streams natively — first-class supported capability.

features.name: Saved zone groups
features.desc: User creates named zone groups (e.g. 'Downstairs', 'Party Mode', 'Bedroom Only') combining any mix of AirPlay 2 endpoints. One tap to recall — Sorriva automates multi-target AirPlay 2 selection. Groups persist across sessions. Each member zone maintains its own internal Sonos/Bluesound configuration.

features.name: Ad-hoc zone groups
features.desc: Temporary zone groupings for the current session only. Dissolve when session ends. Quick-create from zone list without naming or saving.

features.name: EQService abstraction layer
features.desc: Single EQ UI (bass, mid, treble, loudness toggle) that translates to each device's native API. Sonos HTTP API: bass, treble, loudness, balance, Trueplay status. BluOS API: tone controls. Plain AirPlay 2 (HomePod etc.): volume only with honest reduced-state explanation. New device type = new driver, UI never changes.

features.name: Sonos local HTTP API control layer
features.desc: Sonos HTTP API integration for device configuration: bass, treble, loudness, balance, Trueplay status read/write. Runs in parallel with AirPlay 2 audio delivery — separate layers, not mutually exclusive.

features.name: BluOS HTTP API control layer
features.desc: Bluesound BluOS HTTP API integration for device configuration: EQ, tone controls, balance, device config. Runs in parallel with AirPlay 2 audio delivery — separate layers, not mutually exclusive.

features.name: Per-zone and per-group volume control
features.desc: Independent volume control for each zone and each saved group via AirPlay 2 protocol, supplemented by device native API where available.

phases.name: UI — iPhone & iPad
phases.desc: Library, Now Playing, Artist, Album, Zones, Queue, Settings screens. Proven UI before TV.

features.name: Library screen — unified album grid + list
features.desc: Unified album grid and list toggle. Shows local library and streaming service libraries merged. Source badges on all entries. Filter by genre, decade, source, unplayed. Sort by title, year, date added, play count. Search across all sources.

features.name: Now Playing screen
features.desc: Full album art, track info, scrub bar, volume, source badge, zone indicator. Content tabs: Info / Review / Credits / Lyrics. Queue peek. AirPlay 2 zone selector. Like/favorite action.

features.name: Universal search — all sources
features.desc: Single search box across local library, Spotify catalog, Apple Music catalog, Qobuz catalog. Results grouped by source. Instant local results; streaming results load progressively. Tap result to navigate to artist, album, or add to queue.

features.name: Zones panel
features.desc: Unified device list: all AirPlay 2 endpoints, Sonos zones, Bluesound zones in one view. Saved group recall. Ad-hoc group creation. Per-zone EQ panel. Volume controls. Active zone indicator. Zone status (playing/idle/offline).

features.name: Play queue
features.desc: Current queue with drag-to-reorder. Play next vs add to end. Save queue as playlist. Clear queue. Session history — view and replay past sessions. Significantly more capable than existing Sonos and Bluesound queue implementations.

features.name: Artist screen
features.desc: Artist bio, stats, full discography across all sources, related artists rail. Albums sorted by year. 'Play all' and 'Shuffle' actions.

features.name: Album screen
features.desc: Full-bleed album art, track list with play counts, album review, credits panel, source availability row. All tracks show which sources they're available on.

features.name: Favorites + user playlists
features.desc: Favorite tracks, albums, and artists per profile. User-created playlists — add from any source. Playlist detail with mixed-source track list and source badges. Smart playlists (rules-based) deferred to Phase 8.

features.name: Settings screen
features.desc: Library source configuration (SMB paths, local, USB-C). Streaming service OAuth connections. Household profile management. Preferred source order. Home network detection config. Offline download management.

features.name: Offline downloads — owned music
features.desc: Mark albums, playlists, or tracks as 'available offline'. Sorriva downloads from local library to device storage. Mixed playlist offline state — clear visual treatment: checkmark (downloaded) vs cloud icon (needs network). Streaming service downloads remain DRM-sandboxed — accepted limitation, clearly communicated.

phases.name: Apple TV
phases.desc: Lean-back browse, Deriva prompt, zone control, cinematic now playing. Primary living room client.

features.name: Apple TV — home screen
features.desc: Continue Listening rail. Recently Added rail. Deriva suggestion strip. Quick access to saved zone groups. Source status indicators. Designed for 10-foot experience from the ground up.

features.name: Apple TV — cinematic now playing
features.desc: Full-bleed album art backdrop, track info overlay, source badge, zone status. Focus ring navigation. Info / Review / Credits content tabs. Lean-back optimized — minimal interaction required during playback.

features.name: Apple TV — library browse
features.desc: Poster grid with focus-ring navigation optimized for 10-foot experience. Filter rail: genre, decade, source, unplayed. Sort control. Recently Added and Continue Listening rails.

features.name: Apple TV — zone control
features.desc: Zone selector overlay during playback. Saved group recall with one tap. Volume per zone. AirPlay 2 target management initiated from Apple TV.

features.name: Apple TV — universal search
features.desc: On-screen keyboard search across all sources. Results grouped clearly. Optimized for remote navigation.

features.name: Apple TV — Deriva AI prompt entry
features.desc: Natural language prompt entry on Apple TV. On-screen keyboard or iPhone/iPad as keyboard via Continuity. Returns curated shortlist with one-line reasoning per pick.

features.name: iPhone as Apple TV remote
features.desc: iPhone and iPad act as full remote controllers for an active Apple TV Sorriva session. Play/pause/skip, volume, zone switching, queue management — all from phone while Apple TV displays now playing.

phases.name: Deriva AI
phases.desc: AI playlists, discovery, skip learning, library rediscovery. Needs library + play history data to be useful.

features.name: Deriva — mood/context AI playlists
features.desc: Natural language playlist generation from full music graph. Examples: 'Sunday Morning Coffee', 'Late Night Drive', 'Dinner Party'. Draws from local library and all connected streaming services. Profile-aware. Returns playlist with reasoning — explains the thread connecting choices.

features.name: Deriva — music discovery
features.desc: Analyzes most played tracks, artists, genres across all sources. 'Music just like this' from any artist or track. Gateway albums — 'if you love X, here's Y you haven't explored'. Deep cuts surfacing per artist. Sources: MusicBrainz + Last.fm similarity APIs.

features.name: Auto Play
features.desc: Continuous play seeded from currently playing track. Tightness dial: strict (same genre/era) to open (anything goes). Pulls from local library and streaming services. Powered by Last.fm similar tracks API + Deriva pattern learning.

features.name: Deriva — skip pattern learning
features.desc: Track skips and abandons logged across all sources. Learns genre, era, style avoidance patterns per profile. Stops including patterns that consistently get skipped. Improves playlist and auto-play quality over time.

features.name: Deriva — library rediscovery
features.desc: Surfaces forgotten and unplayed albums in library. 'You added this 3 years ago and never played it.' Cross-references with listening patterns to find likely matches. Scheduled rediscovery suggestions.

features.name: Deriva — contextual soft signals
features.desc: Time-of-day and seasonal awareness as soft signals for playlist generation. Optional weather API integration. Signals inform but don't hard-filter — AI weighs them naturally.

phases.name: Extended
phases.desc: Vinyl library, Billboard archive, Shazam, playback stats, iOS widgets, CarPlay, Mac bridge, smart playlists, watchOS, SiriusXM. Polish and differentiation.

features.name: Mac library bridge — optional always-on local library access
features.desc: Optional Mac app that runs as a menu bar agent on a home Mac. Scans attached drives and NAS. Exposes local library remotely via cloud backend relay. Enables full library access anywhere without VPN or Tailscale. Users without Mac bridge get streaming services fallback when away from home.

features.name: Playback statistics + annual wrap-up
features.desc: Albums, tracks, artists, genres, decades — all ranked by play count across all sources. Total hours played, total tracks and albums. Session history. Annual wrap-up — 'your year in music' across all sources.

features.name: Vinyl library — collection management
features.desc: Separate vinyl collection management module. Manual entry or barcode scan. Discogs API for metadata (pressing info, matrix numbers, label variants). Fields: title, artist, label, catalog number, pressing, year, format (LP/Single/EP/78), condition (Goldmine scale), purchase price and date. Collection browser, value estimator (Discogs marketplace), wantlist, duplicates detection, 'You own this digitally too' cross-reference. Export CSV/PDF for insurance.

features.name: Deriva — vinyl recommendations
features.desc: Cross-reference digital listening patterns against vinyl collection. 'Based on your digital listening, here are records you should own.' Surfaces gaps and acquisition targets from Discogs marketplace.

features.name: Smart playlists — rules-based
features.desc: Auto-generated playlists from rules: genre + decade + unplayed + minimum play count + source combinations. Auto-update as library grows. Cross-source — rules apply across local library and all connected streaming services.

features.name: Billboard archive — Top 100 every year 1955–present
features.desc: Annual Top 100 every year from 1955 to present. Browse by year or decade. Each entry resolves to best available source (local library first, then Apple Music or Spotify). 'You own X of the [year] Top 100' stat per year.

features.name: Shazam integration
features.desc: Read Shazam library and generate playlist. Resolve each tag to local library first, then subscribed service as fallback. Best-effort write-back sync via Apple's limited Shazam API.

features.name: iOS widgets — Now Playing, Zone selector, Quick play
features.desc: Now Playing widget (art, track, controls). Zone selector widget. Quick play favorites widget. Implemented via react-native-widget-extension.

features.name: Apple CarPlay
features.desc: Playback control while driving. Requires Apple CarPlay entitlement. React Native CarPlay community library. Browse recently played, favorites, Deriva playlists. Play/pause/skip/volume — no complex navigation while driving.

features.name: watchOS app
features.desc: Basic playback controls and Now Playing display on Apple Watch. Play/pause/skip/volume. Complications for current track. Scope TBD — deferred until iPhone UI is proven.

features.name: SiriusXM integration
features.desc: Satellite radio via sxm-player library. Subscription required. Legal posture for personal use TBD. Deferred pending decision.
